content:
# Drag Reduction

**Summary**: The reduction in the pressure drop of a fluid flowing through a pipe or other conduit.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] analyzed drag-reduction to improve pumping rates and flow capacity in acidizing systems.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Crucial for increasing pumping rates and reducing energy costs in well stimulation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Comparing pressure drops of different acid formulations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Pickering EAS showed lower drag compared to normal EAS even after adding CNDs as DRAs. ([[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023, p. 18]])
